plugin_desc: Pan Dacom optical transmission SNMP child template. The currently verified profile is a clean baseline built on standard MIB-II and IF-MIB ifXTable; no stable vendor-specific row-filter-free health gauges are confirmed for link state, temperature, optical power, fan or power state. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json. The shared Transmission SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics and aggregate traffic through the generic snmp/transmission metric model while this plugin provides the Pan Dacom collect_type, UI and Telegraf child template. Supported brands/models — Pan Dacom CWDM and optical transmission devices.
name: Transmission
